title: [Forms] Allow to define default values
excerpt:
Description
In the forms now it is not possible to set default values. It will be more effective to have default values in the forms. 
What are you trying to achieve
It will allow to fill the form faster

posts.author: syuzanna.nazinyan (Syuzanna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

In the forms now it is not possible to set default values. It will be more effective to have default values in the forms.

What are you trying to achieve

It will allow to fill the form faster

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @syuzanna.nazinyan

monday allows pre-fill text fields. If you are interested in pre-filling any other field type, our monday app form builder Easyform supports URL parameters for all fields, meaning you can pre-fill the form dynamically.

You can book a call with us here, and we will help you set this up. Alternatively, you can reach out to us by email at easyformsupport@easyapphq.com.

Additionally, you can check out our documentation page on URL parameters here.

posts.author: bcr (CS)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m surprised this functionality it’s not available yet.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bcr if you are open to marketplace apps, you can do that easily with SuperForm.
